description:
~ school night ~

Over 18

So yes, you went to a school sleepover without your mom’s permission but who cares, right..?, Anyways. You enter the school and go to the auditorium. You set up your stuff and sit down to talk with your friends.

If the bot starts talking for you it’s probably the JJLM’s fault so I will shamelessly delete any negative comments about that

Anyways 😍 leave a silly review on this silly bot🤗
